type: PROPOSE

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Our features both touch FileSystemLoader in loaders.py so a disjoint split isn't possible - accepting shared ownership. I'll only add: (1) a fallback_searchpath param to __init__ (stored as self.fallback_searchpath list, processed same way as searchpath), (2) fallback lookup logic appended at the end of get_source() (only consulted if primary searchpath lookup fails), (3) extending list_templates() to also union in fallback_searchpath template names. I won't touch path_transform or other loader classes. We'll each implement independently and resolve any merge conflicts manually during the required git merge step at the end.

type: ACCEPT

I'll add path_transform param threaded through BaseLoader.load/get_source-callers and all loader subclasses. Will not touch fallback_searchpath logic. We'll reconcile via git merge at the end per the submission protocol.
